message:
feat(core): display fleet_pressure_tier in HealthSnapshot plain text output (ft-dwjtm)

Add fleet memory pressure tier to the HealthSnapshotRenderer plain text
output, displayed alongside the existing backpressure tier. Only shown
when the coordinator has evaluated (non-None). JSON output already
includes the field via serde. Two new tests: presence when set, absence
when None.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
